title: Connectors missing in AI Agent node after update
symptom: After updating n8n, all workflows using AI Agent nodes show missing connectors. This affects both existing and new workflows.
applies_when: Updated n8n to the latest version
Using AI Agent nodes in workflows
root_cause: The issue arises from the Content Security Policy (CSP) headers configured in the Caddy server. These headers can restrict the loading of necessary resources, leading to missing connectors in the UI.
fix_steps: Review and adjust the CSP headers to allow necessary resources
Check the AI Agent nodes in n8n again
agent_instruction: Adjust the CSP headers in your Caddy configuration to resolve the missing connectors issue.
